site.name: PreSecurity
site.slogan: Security in Sight. Protection in Focus.
site.tagline: Security services in the canton of Zurich

hero.eyebrow: Security from the canton of Zurich
hero.title: Cameras and video surveillance — properly installed
hero.subtitle: We plan, install and maintain surveillance systems for your home or business. Personal advice, fair prices, locally based.

services.section_subtitle: From consultation to maintenance — everything from a single source.

offer.title: Request a free quote
offer.subtitle: Get your non-binding quote in just a few steps.

step1.title: Which devices are you interested in?
step1.subtitle: Multiple selection possible. You can adjust the quantity in the next step.
step1.error: Please select at least one device.

step2.title: Quantity per device
step2.subtitle: Roughly how many devices do you need? An estimate is enough.

step3.title: Where should the devices be installed?
step3.subtitle: Multiple selection possible.
step3.error: Please select at least one location.

step4.title: Your contact details
step4.subtitle: We will get back to you within one business day.
step4.consent: I have read the {link} and accept the processing of my data for handling this request.

success.title: Thank you for your request!
success.body: We have received your quote request and will get back to you within one business day.
